claude_vision_detection.notes: Uses Claude Vision with structured JSON response

bounding_box_extraction.notes: x, y, width, height extracted per watermark

coordinate_scaling.notes: Scales from LLM-optimized dims back to original

binary_mask_creation.notes: np.zeros mask with regions filled to 255

before_after_comparison.notes: Quality score computed before and after

fallback_to_original.notes: Returns original bytes when quality drops too much

no_watermark_passthrough.notes: Returns original unchanged if no watermark

recommendations: Consider adding support for semi-transparent watermark detection
Explore cv2.INPAINT_NS as alternative algorithm for specific watermark types
